rooms.name: Solo Study Cube
rooms.description: Your own quiet corner. A personal desk space with side dividers to keep you focused and free of distractions.

rooms.name: Open Space
rooms.description: A bright, flexible drop-in area with shared long tables. Great for light studying or working alongside others.

rooms.name: Group Study Room
rooms.description: A dedicated room for study groups and team sessions. Comfortable seating for up to 8 people with collaboration tools.

rooms.name: Lounge Area
rooms.description: Kick back and study in comfort. Cozy sofas and low tables make this perfect for reading, light work, or unwinding between sessions.

rooms.name: VIP Room
rooms.description: Our premium private room. Fully equipped for presentations, intensive group work, or anyone who wants the best experience Nook & Brew has to offer.

menu.name: Soda
menu.description: Choice of Coke, Fanta, or Sprite. Ice cold and refreshing.

menu.name: Fruit Juice
menu.description: Freshly blended juice of the day. Ask our staff for today's flavour.

menu.name: Tea
menu.description: Classic Kenyan tea, brewed with milk, tea leaves and spices (optional).

menu.name: Black Coffee
menu.description: Freshly brewed black coffee to keep you sharp.

menu.name: Cappuccino
menu.description: Espresso topped with steamed milk and a thick layer of foam.

menu.name: Flavoured Milk
menu.description: Choice of chocolate, strawberry, or vanilla.

menu.name: Muffin
menu.description: Soft, fluffy muffin that is freshly baked.

menu.name: Mandazi
menu.description: Soft and lightly sweetened pack of 3. Best enjoyed with tea.

menu.name: Samosa
menu.description: Crispy pastry filled with spiced minced meat.

menu.name: Toast
menu.description: Thick slices of toasted bread served with butter and jam on the side. Served in a 4 slice portion

menu.name: Sandwich
menu.description: Freshly made sandwich with your choice of meat or veggie filling.

menu.name: Cookies
menu.description: Homestyle baked cookies. Chocolate chip or oatmeal raisin — both made in house.

menu.name: Orange
menu.description: Sweet, juicy orange. Peel and enjoy or ask us to juice it for you.
